description_long: This is a retro-style camper van with a white and pastel-colored exterior, featuring a large windshield and rounded front. The roof is fitted with a wooden deck, complete with a railing, a small plant, and a blue-striped mat, accessible via a metal ladder at the rear. The side windows are covered with curtains, and the van has a set of four wheels, with the front left wheel removed and replaced by a white bicycle leaning against the side. Three wooden stump seats are arranged on a black mat next to the van, suggesting a cozy outdoor setup. The van's body is primarily metal, with glass windows and wooden and metal rooftop elements. The overall appearance is whimsical and inviting, blending elements of travel, leisure, and outdoor living.
description: A vintage camper van with a rooftop wooden deck, side curtains, and an outdoor setup including a bicycle and wooden stump seats. The van is painted in white and pastel tones, with a cozy, lived-in feel.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the windshield, side windows with curtains, rooftop deck, bicycle, and three wooden stumps on a black mat.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the van's rounded nose, rooftop deck with railing and plant, and the absence of the bicycle and stumps.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the metal ladder to the rooftop deck, rear windows, and the wooden deck's details.
description_view_3: Rear-left view showing the ladder, rooftop deck, bicycle, and wooden stumps, with a clear view of the van's back.
attribute_window_configuration: two rectangular side windows on each side, one large curved front windshield, two small rear windows
attribute_door_placement: single entry door on the right side near the front
